description: Implement Universal Executor/Auditor Exchange Ledger Loop as roadmap item 10. Create governance structure for traceable execution loop through ledger with proper actor handoff protocols.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap progression from completed item 9 (AUDIT-AUTHORITY-LOCK-DEV-EXECUTION-LOCK) to item 10 (UNIVERSAL EXECUTOR / AUDITOR EXCHANGE LEDGER LOOP)
